app.title: OPAL
app.subtitle: AI Image Processing
app.footer: OPAL Platform v0.5 | AI-Powered Image Processing

landing.badge: Built for Shopify, Etsy & WooCommerce sellers
landing.heroSub: Your competitors pay photographers thousands. You connect your store, click one button, and Opal upgrades every product image — background removal, lifestyle scenes, and HD upscaling. Then it pushes them right back.
landing.heroNote: No credit card needed. Start with free preview images.
landing.showcaseSub: A real Etsy product photo, transformed by Opal in under 60 seconds.
landing.howTitle: From phone photo to store-ready in 4 automated steps!
landing.howSub: Connect your store and let Opal handle the rest. The whole thing takes seconds per image.
landing.step2Desc: Pick some — or process your entire catalog
landing.pain1: I spent my whole weekend editing product photos and they still look amateur next to the competition.
landing.pain2: A photographer quoted me €500 for 10 products. I have 200 products in my store.
landing.pain3: I know my photos are costing me sales, but I don't have the time or budget to fix them all.
landing.painCta: Opal upgrades your entire product catalog so you can focus on running your business.
landing.featuresSub: From a single phone photo to a listing that converts — Opal handles every step.
landing.feature1Desc: Drop in any product photo and Opal strips away the background instantly. Kitchen table, wrinkled bedsheet, messy desk — gone. Clean cutout, ready for any scene.
landing.feature2Desc: No studio needed. Opal places your product in realistic settings — marble countertops, wooden tables, morning light. Looks like you hired a photographer.
landing.feature3Desc: Blurry phone photo? Opal sharpens and upscales your images so they look crisp on any device, from mobile to desktop.
landing.feature4Desc: Every processed image gets an optimized alt text and SEO-friendly filename automatically. Better search rankings, zero manual work.
landing.feature5Desc: Don't upgrade images one by one. Process your entire store catalog in a single click — hundreds of products, all upgraded and pushed back automatically.
landing.feature6Desc: Not sure which image sells better? Test two variants on your live store and let the data decide. Statistical significance tells you when you have a real winner.
landing.feature7Desc: Set up your brand profile once — colors, mood, style — and Opal applies it to every image. 10 products or 10,000, they all look like they belong together.
landing.feature8Desc: Export images perfectly sized for Amazon, eBay, Instagram, Pinterest, and 7 more platforms. One click, every format you need.
landing.integrationDesc: Connect your webshop in 30 seconds. Opal pulls your product images, upgrades them, and pushes them right back — no downloads, no re-uploads, no manual work.
landing.integrationPoint1: One-click connection to Shopify, Etsy & WooCommerce
landing.integrationPoint2: Bulk process your entire catalog at once
landing.integrationPoint3: Processed images pushed back to your listings automatically
landing.integrationPoint4: A/B test different images to find what converts best
landing.abSub: Stop guessing. A/B test your product images on your live store and let real shoppers tell you which version sells better.
landing.abStep1Desc: Choose any two processed images for the same product — different scenes, angles, or styles.
landing.abStep2Title: Run the test on your store
landing.abStep2Desc: Opal swaps the images on your live listing. Track views, clicks, and conversions for each variant.
landing.abStep3Desc: When the data is statistically significant, Opal tells you which image drives more sales. One click to make it permanent.
landing.brandDesc: Set up a brand profile once — your colors, your mood, your style — and Opal applies it to every image. Whether you have 10 products or 10,000, they'll all look like they belong together.
landing.pricingTitle: Plans that grow with your store
landing.pricingSub: Subscribe monthly and save, or buy token packs whenever you need them. One token = one image.
landing.ctaSub: Connect your store, try it on a few products for free. When your conversion rate goes up, you'll know why.
landing.footerTagline: Studio-quality product photos for every webshop

footer.tagline: Studio-quality product photos for every webshop

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the Opal platform operated by Opal Optics ("we", "us", "our"). By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.section1: Opal is an AI-powered image processing platform that provides background removal, AI scene generation, image upscaling, SEO metadata generation, and related services for e-commerce product images. The service integrates with third-party e-commerce platforms including Shopify, Etsy, and WooCommerce, and is also accessible via our WooCommerce plugin and API.
terms.section2: You may access Opal by signing in with a Microsoft Entra account (which creates your account automatically on first login) or by using an API key. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials. You must not share API keys with unauthorized third parties.
terms.section3: Opal uses a token-based billing system. One token equals one image processed. Tokens can be purchased as one-time packs or through monthly subscriptions. Token deductions occur at job creation time. Unused tokens from subscriptions roll over to the next billing period. One-time tokens never expire. All payments are processed through Mollie (a European payment provider). Prices are displayed in EUR. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis — contact support within 14 days of purchase.
terms.section4: You may only upload images that you have the right to use. You must not use Opal to process illegal, offensive, or infringing content. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate this policy. Automated bulk access via our API or plugins must comply with reasonable rate limits.
terms.section5: Opal uses third-party AI services to process your images, including fal.ai for scene generation, BiRefNet for background removal, and Real-ESRGAN for upscaling. Your images are transmitted to these services for processing and are not retained by them beyond the processing duration. We also use Florence-2 for SEO alt-text generation. By using our service, you consent to your images being processed by these providers.
terms.section6: When you connect your Shopify, Etsy, or WooCommerce store (including via our WooCommerce plugin), Opal accesses your product data and images through the respective platform APIs. OAuth tokens for these connections are encrypted at rest. You can disconnect your store at any time, which revokes Opal's access. Opal only accesses product and image data — it does not access customer, order, or financial data from your store.
terms.section7: You retain all rights to your original images. AI-generated scene backgrounds are provided for your commercial use without restriction. The Opal platform, branding, and technology are the property of Opal Optics.
terms.section8: We strive for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted service. Processing times depend on queue load and third-party provider availability. Free-tier images include a watermark. We may modify features, pricing, or token allocations with reasonable notice.
terms.section9: Opal is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Our liability is limited to the amount you have paid for the service in the preceding 12 months. We are not responsible for any losses resulting from processed images, store integration issues, or third-party provider failures.
terms.section10: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification.
terms.section11: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Netherlands. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in the Netherlands.
terms.section12: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@opaloptics.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Opal Optics ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use the Opal platform. We are committed to GDPR compliance and act as a data processor for your image data.
privacy.section1: Opal Optics acts as the data controller for account and billing data, and as a data processor for images and product data processed through our platform. Our contact details: support@opaloptics.com.
privacy.section2a: Account data: Email address, display name, and authentication identifiers (from Microsoft Entra External ID). This data is collected automatically when you first sign in.
privacy.section2b: Billing data: Transaction history, token balance, subscription status, and payment references. Payment details (credit card, bank account) are handled entirely by Mollie and never stored on our servers.
privacy.section2c: Image data: Product images you upload or that are pulled from your connected stores. Processed output images. Images are stored in Azure Blob Storage in the West Europe region.
privacy.section2d: Integration data: Store URLs, OAuth tokens (encrypted at rest using Fernet encryption), and product metadata from Shopify, Etsy, and WooCommerce.
privacy.section2e: Usage data: Job history, processing preferences, brand profiles, and API key usage logs.
privacy.section3: We use your data to: provide image processing services, manage your account and billing, connect to your e-commerce stores, generate SEO metadata for your images, and improve our services. We do not sell your data to third parties. We do not use your images to train AI models.
privacy.section4: We share data with the following third-party processors as necessary to provide our services: fal.ai (image generation — images are transmitted for processing and not retained), Microsoft Azure (infrastructure, storage, authentication — data stored in West Europe), Mollie (payment processing — EU-based), and the respective e-commerce platform APIs (Shopify, Etsy, WooCommerce) when you connect your store.
privacy.section5: Processed images are retained for 90 days after processing, after which they may be automatically deleted. Account data is retained as long as your account is active. Billing records are retained for 7 years as required by Dutch tax law. You can request data export or deletion at any time through your account settings. Administrators can trigger data cleanup via the admin panel.
privacy.section6: Under the GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, erase your data (right to be forgotten), restrict processing, data portability (export your data), object to processing, and withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact support@opaloptics.com or use the data export/deletion features in your account settings. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section7: We protect your data with: encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS), encryption at rest for sensitive data (OAuth tokens, API keys), Azure infrastructure with enterprise-grade security, role-based access controls, and regular security reviews. Despite these measures, no system is 100% secure. Report security concerns to support@opaloptics.com.
privacy.section8: Opal uses only essential cookies and local storage for: authentication state (MSAL.js), language preference, UI preferences (sidebar state, A/B variant assignment), and session management. We do not use analytics cookies, advertising trackers, or third-party tracking scripts. No cookie consent banner is required as we only use strictly necessary cookies.
privacy.section9: Your data is primarily stored and processed within the European Economic Area (West Europe Azure region). Image data may be temporarily transmitted to fal.ai servers for AI processing. We ensure appropriate safeguards for any data transfers outside the EEA.
privacy.section10: Opal is not intended for use by individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacy.section11: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacy.section12: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your data rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at support@opaloptics.com.

tips.dashboardWelcome: Start by uploading product images — Opal handles the rest!
tips.uploadDrag: Drag & drop multiple images at once for batch processing.
tips.uploadPreset: Use "Full Enhancement" for the best results — it combines all three processing steps.
tips.uploadBrand: Select a brand profile to keep all your product images consistent.
tips.resultsExport: Download all images as a ZIP, or export in platform-specific sizes.
tips.brandsTip: Brand profiles save your preferred style — colors, mood, and scenes are reused automatically.
tips.integrationsTip: Connect your store to process and push images back without re-uploading.
tips.abTestsTip: A/B test different product images on your live store to find what converts best.
tips.benchmarksTip: Upload an image to get an instant quality score and improvement suggestions.
tips.billingTip: Monthly plans save up to 35% compared to one-time packs.

help.processingPipeline: Choose how your images are processed. Full Enhancement gives the best results for product listings.
help.removeBackground: Removes the background from your product image, leaving a clean cutout on a transparent background.
help.sceneGeneration: Places your product in a professional AI-generated setting — like a marble countertop or lifestyle scene.
help.hdUpscale: Sharpens and upscales your image to HD quality, making it look crisp on any device.
help.brandProfile: Select a brand profile to apply consistent colors, mood, and style to all generated scenes.
help.scenesPerImage: Generate multiple different scene variations for each product image. More scenes = more options to choose from.
help.multiAngle: Generate your product from different camera angles — great for showing all sides in your listing.
help.brandProfiles: Brand profiles save your preferred style settings — colors, mood, and scenes — so every product image looks consistent.
help.connectedStores: Your linked webshops. Opal can pull product images, process them, and push them back automatically.
help.connectStore: Connect your Shopify, Etsy, or WooCommerce store in a few clicks. Opal never accesses customer or payment data.
help.abTests: Test two different product images on your live store to see which one gets more clicks and sales.
help.imageScore: Upload any product image to get an instant quality score. See how it compares to your category and get improvement suggestions.
